mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS registerId, TO_CHAR(r.visit_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS visitDate, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.realname AS doctorName, mr.diagnosis AS diagnosis, r.visit_state AS visitState, CASE r.visit_state WHEN 'REGISTERED' THEN '待就诊' WHEN 'CONSULTING' THEN '就诊中' WHEN 'FINISHED' THEN '已完成' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN '已取消' ELSE '' END AS visitStateName, r.noon AS noon, r.queue_no AS queueNumber, r.checkin_status AS checkinStatus, rl.regist_fee AS registFee, r.deptment_id AS deptId, r.employee_id AS doctorId, p.real_name AS patientName, p.gender AS gender, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, p.birthdate))::INTEGER AS age, mr.allergy AS allergyHistory, p.case_number AS caseNumber FROM register r LEFT JOIN department d ON r.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON r.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON r.id = mr.register_id LEFT JOIN regist_level rl ON r.regist_level_id = rl.id LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id WHERE r.id = #{registerId}

SELECT r.id AS registerId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.realname AS doctorName, r.visit_date::date AS visitDate, r.noon AS noon, CONCAT(d.dept_name, '诊区') AS location, p.real_name AS patientName, r.checkin_status AS checkinStatus FROM register r LEFT JOIN department d ON r.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON r.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id WHERE r.patient_id = #{patientId} AND r.visit_date::date = #{today} AND r.visit_state = 'REGISTERED' AND r.checkin_status = 0 ORDER BY r.visit_date, r.queue_no

SELECT r.id AS registerId, p.real_name AS patientName, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.realname AS doctorName, CASE WHEN r.checkin_status = 1 AND r.visit_state = 'CONSULTING' THEN 'WAITING' WHEN r.visit_state = 'FINISHED' THEN 'PASSED' ELSE 'WAITING' END AS status FROM register r LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN department d ON r.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON r.employee_id = e.id WHERE r.employee_id = #{doctorId} AND r.visit_date::date = #{visitDate}::date AND r.noon = #{noon} AND r.visit_state IN ('REGISTERED', 'CONSULTING', 'FINISHED') AND r.checkin_status = 1 ORDER BY r.queue_no

SELECT r.*, p.real_name, p.gender, p.birthdate, p.case_number, p.phone, p.home_address, mr.readme, mr.present, mr.diagnosis, mr.record_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_request WHERE register_id = r.id) as check_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection_request WHERE register_id = r.id) as inspection_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prescription WHERE register_id = r.id) as prescription_count FROM register r JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON r.id = mr.register_id WHERE r.id = #{registerId}

SELECT r.*, p.real_name, p.gender, p.birthdate, p.case_number, d.dept_name, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, p.birthdate))::INTEGER AS age FROM register r JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id JOIN department d ON r.deptment_id = d.id WHERE r.employee_id = #{doctorId} AND r.visit_state = #{visitState} ORDER BY r.queue_no ASC, r.visit_date ASC
